title: Build multi-source memory retriever service for AI mail agent
job: Create mail-memory-retriever service. Function retrieveContext(tenantId, threadId, messageId): fetches and ranks (a) identity memory for IAML, (b) semantic memory entries relevant to message (vector/keyword search), (c) recent episodic events (approved/rejected drafts), (d) contact memory for sender from mail_contact_memory, (e) thread context (prior messages in thread). Returns a compressed RetrievalBundle with provenance refs for each item. Strictly tenant-scoped. Keep context compact to avoid prompt bloat.
